reviews.name: Margaret B.
reviews.text: "The doctor was incredibly patient and thorough. Explained my condition clearly and in a way that actually made sense to me."

reviews.name: James W.
reviews.text: "The treatment plan has made a huge difference in my daily life. I really feel like my health is in good hands."

reviews.name: Robert C.
reviews.text: "Very professional office. The staff is friendly and the doctor takes time to listen without rushing through the appointment."

reviews.name: Sarah K.
reviews.text: "Compassionate care. He didn't rush me through questions about my medication side effects — I felt truly heard."

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: "Professional and thorough. The entire medical team seems very synchronized and works seamlessly together."

hero.heading: CariBear is ready to help.
hero.greeting: I am CariBear. You haven't set up your PCP yet. Would you like to set one up?
hero.conciergeMessage: I noticed you haven't had your annual check-up yet. Would you like me to find a provider near you?

aiInsight.titleSuffix: your wellness journey is trending positively.
aiInsight.description: Based on your recent blood work and visit history, you are up to date on all vital screenings. Your blood glucose management has shown significant stability over the last quarter.

wellness.title: Earn Rewards for Staying Healthy
wellness.body: Complete wellness activities and earn points redeemable for gift cards, fitness gear, and more.

diagnoses.subtitle: High blood pressure with no identifiable cause

500 City General Way, San Francisco, CA 94102
45 Skin Care Lane, San Diego, CA 92101

wellnessWisdom.title: Mindful Eating for Longevity
wellnessWisdom.description: Discover how shifting your relationship with food can lead to increased energy and mental clarity during your senior years.

notifications.title: Wellness Tip: Hydration
notifications.body: Drinking an extra 8oz of water today can improve your energy levels by up to 20%. Try keeping a bottle on your desk as a reminder.

notifications.title: Appointment Reminder
notifications.body: Your visit with Dr. Aris is scheduled for tomorrow at 2:00 PM at Jefferson Health – Center City. Please remember to fast 8 hours before your visit.

notifications.title: Action Required: Missing Information
notifications.body: Your claim #CLM-2891 for Emergency Room Services needs additional documentation. Please upload the itemized bill within 10 days to avoid denial.

notifications.title: Refill Ready for Pickup
notifications.body: Your prescription for Lisinopril 10mg is ready at CVS Pharmacy on Chestnut St. It will be held for 7 days before being returned to stock.

notifications.title: Claim Processed
notifications.body: Your claim for the recent lab work at LabCorp has been successfully processed and approved. Insurance paid $184.00. Your responsibility is $15.00.

notifications.title: Annual Checkup Due This Month
notifications.body: Your annual preventive care visit is due within 30 days. Preventive visits are covered at 100% under your Member Portal Plan plan — no copay required.

notifications.title: Appointment Confirmed
notifications.body: Your follow-up with Dr. Sarah Jenkins has been confirmed. You will receive a video call link 15 minutes before your visit.

notifications.title: Prescription Expiring Soon
notifications.body: Your prescription for Metformin 500mg has 1 refill remaining and expires in 2 weeks. Contact Dr. Jenkins to renew it before your supply runs out.

notifications.title: Explanation of Benefits Available
notifications.body: Your EOB for the Cardiology consultation is now available. Total billed: $320.00 — Plan paid: $272.00 — Your share: $48.00.

notifications.title: New Benefit: Free Gym Membership
notifications.body: As a valued Member Portal Plan member, you now have access to a free Silver&Fit gym membership. Enroll through the Benefits tab to activate your account.

notifications.title: Password Changed Successfully
notifications.body: Your account password was recently updated. If you did not make this change, please contact member support immediately at 1-800-521-6867.

notifications.title: New Device Login Detected
notifications.body: A sign-in was detected from a new device: Chrome on Windows in Philadelphia, PA. If this was you, no action is needed. If not, reset your password now.

notifications.title: Visit Summary Ready
notifications.body: Your after-visit summary for your recent Primary Care appointment with Dr. Jenkins is available. Review your care plan, lab orders, and follow-up instructions.

notifications.title: Specialty Pharmacy Order Shipped
notifications.body: Your Atorvastatin 20mg (90-day supply) has been shipped via USPS Priority Mail and is on its way to your address on file.

medicalHistory.title: Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
medicalHistory.subtitle: Dr. Sarah Jenkins • Primary Care
medicalHistory.description: Follow-up evaluation and management plan updated. Chronic management plan initiated with Metformin 500mg.

medicalHistory.title: Comprehensive Blood Work
medicalHistory.subtitle: City Central Lab
medicalHistory.description: Metabolic panel and lipid profile conducted. Glucose level: 115 mg/dL (High).

medicalHistory.title: Annual Flu Shot
medicalHistory.subtitle: CVS Pharmacy
medicalHistory.description: Administered at CVS Pharmacy. Influenza vaccine quadrivalent. No adverse reactions.

medicalHistory.title: Annual Wellness Visit
medicalHistory.subtitle: Dr. Elena Rodriguez
medicalHistory.description: Annual wellness visit at St. Jude Medical Plaza. Comprehensive physical examination completed.
medicalHistory.notes: Patient maintains healthy BP. Diet and exercise routine is effective.

medicalHistory.title: HbA1c Test
medicalHistory.subtitle: LabCorp Philadelphia
medicalHistory.description: HbA1c level: 6.8% (Target: <7.0%). Management plan is effective.

medicalHistory.title: Hypertension
medicalHistory.subtitle: Dr. Marcus Thorne
medicalHistory.description: Blood pressure stabilized at 128/82. Continue current medication.
